title: 21:19 ГўВЂВ” June 16, 2021
body_text:
21:19 ГўВЂВ” June 16, 2021
Updates to Incoming Wire Routing Instructions
We added a new form with routing instructions for New Zealand dollars (NZD).
Document Library
Details
Status
Routing Instructions ГўВЂВ“ New Zealand Dollar (NZD) Incoming Wires
9352
Provides routing instructions for New Zealand dollar incoming wires.
New
We updated the routing instructions for the forms listed below. We also replaced terms ГўВЂВњwire transferГўВЂВќ and ГўВЂВњtransferГўВЂВќ with ГўВЂВњwire(s)ГўВЂВќ in the forms and renamed the forms accordingly.

We are in the process of updating the Wires Part, which will make the Funds Transfer Part obsolete. The updated form names in the Document Library and the related routing instructions content will be included in the upcoming Wires Part revision.
